title: rosa × doniana f. subnuda
intro: Rosa × doniana f. subnuda, also known as Rosa × alba 'Subnuda', is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae, characterized by its unique ability to produce white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa × doniana f. subnuda include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
